atoms.semantic_claim: Local payload attribute construction explicitly sets engine payload `extra_data` to None, preserving default local-miner payload attributes after the upstream type added the field.

destinations.snippet: EthPayloadAttributes { timestamp, prev_randao: B256::random(), suggested_fee_recipient: Address::random(), withdrawals: ..., parent_beacon_block_root: ..., extra_data: None, slot_number: ... }
destinations.evidence: The destination local payload builder contains the same explicit `extra_data: None` field in the constructed EthPayloadAttributes.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Instantiate LocalPayloadAttributesBuilder and assert the built EthPayloadAttributes has extra_data == None while timestamp/withdrawal/root behavior remains unchanged.
atoms.notes: Exact destination evidence found in the same path and builder function.

summary: Local payload attributes explicitly set extra_data to None and the port carries the same field initialization.
notes: This is high-risk because it touches payload attribute construction, but the mapping is exact.
